inputs: Don't be stupid! Copyright Infringement is a crime! I'll get you sucka!

movesList.name: P
inputs: -  Punch             c.P  - Crouch Punch             j.P  -  Jump Punch

movesList.name: K
inputs: -  Kick              c.K  - Crouch Kick              j.K  -  Jump Kick

movesList.name: S
inputs: -  Slash             c.S  - Crouch Slash             j.S  -  Jump Slash

movesList.name: HS -
inputs: Heavy             c.HS - Crouch Heavy             j.HS -  Jump Heavy

movesList.name: f
inputs: -  forward    d/f  -  tap down+forward

movesList.name: b
inputs: -  back       d/b  -  tap down+back

movesList.name: u
inputs: -  up         u/f  -  tap up+forward

movesList.name: d
inputs: -  down       u/b  -  tap up+back

movesList.name: QCF
inputs: -  quarter circle forward (d,d/f,f)

movesList.name: QCB
inputs: -  quarter circle back    (d,d/b,b)

movesList.name: HCF
inputs: -  half circle forward    (b,d/b,d,d/f,f)

movesList.name: HCB
inputs: -  half circle back       (f,d/f,d,d/b,b)

movesList.name: DP
inputs: -  dragon punch           (f,d,d/f)

movesList.name: RDP -
inputs: reverse dragon punch   (b,d,d/f)

movesList.name: CB
inputs: -  charge back            (hold back, down+back, or up+back)

movesList.name: CD
inputs: -  charge down            (charge down, down+back, or down+forward)

movesList.name: JC
inputs: -  Jump Cancel

movesList.name: ALL
inputs: - P+K+S+HS

movesList.name: FL
inputs: - this move, or part of the move, floats opponent

movesList.name: KB
inputs: - this move, or part of the move, knocks the opponent back

movesList.name: RF
inputs: - this move, or part of the move, floats if Roman Cancelled

movesList.name: DF
inputs: - this move Dust Floats the opponent

movesList.name: h
inputs: - HIGH     (hold back to block. can be crouched under)

movesList.name: m
inputs: - MID      (hold back or down+back to block)

movesList.name: l
inputs: - LOW      (hold down+back to block. will hit stand-blocking opponents)

movesList.name: o
inputs: - OVERHEAD (this move hits crouch-blocking opponents)

movesList.name: Move Name
inputs: Command          Lev.  Min/Max DMG          Com.    *

movesList.name: Anji
inputs: Axl     Baiken     Chipp     Dizzy     Faust      Jam     Johnny

movesList.name: Ky
inputs: May     Millia    Potemkin    Sol    Testament   Venom     Zato
